title: Xau analysis
author: ResearcherPitiful224
selftext:
*XAUUSD ANALYSIS 🚨*

- Gold after a massive bull run hovers around 3535.
- ⁠After a PDH sweep, a ch-o-ch in ltf will confirm at smaller downtrend insisting a retracement to 3470.
- ⁠Technical indicators favours a bullish setup.

*Fundamental view 🔥 !*

- Rate cuts in sept has reached to 91% probability in CME Fedwatch tool. 
- ⁠Tensions in TARRIF and uncertainty leading to a bull run in yellow metal.

*Underdog 🧐*
- XAGUSD seems to be a better opinion as gold prices are seen to be overbought.

*Trade based on analysis ✨*
Sell gold 3535-31
Target 1 - 3523
Target 2 - 3516
Target 3 - 3505
Target 4 - 3490
SL - 3555
